message.content:
You are test-agent for task T3: M2+M3-Entity — Task Entity + TaskStatus + Repository + DTOs.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- READONLY context: none
- Spec files for reference: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-3.log.md
- pom.xml (for dependencies): C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/pom.xml

Task description:
Build the Task domain entity layer with state machine logic.

ALLOWED implementation files (that the Worker will create — you write tests for these):
1. entity/Task.java — Task entity (id, title, description, priority[inner enum HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW], status, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt, deleted), with JPA annotations
2. entity/TaskStatus.java — enum with TODO/IN_PROGRESS/DONE/CLOSED, contains getAllowedTransitions() and canTransitionTo(TaskStatus) methods
3. repository/TaskRepository.java — JPA repository with custom queries for pagination + keyword + priority filtering (excluding soft-deleted)
4. dto/TaskResponse.java — id, title, description, priority, status, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
5. dto/CreateTaskRequest.java — title (required, 1-200), description (optional, max 5000), priority (optional, default MEDIUM), with Jakarta Validation

Acceptance criteria to test:
- Task entity defaults: status=TODO, deleted=false on creation
- Task entity JPA mapping works correctly (can persist and retrieve)
- Priority enum has exactly HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW values
- TaskStatus enum has exactly TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, CLOSED values
- TaskStatus.canTransitionTo: TODO→IN_PROGRESS=true, IN_PROGRESS→TODO=true, IN_PROGRESS→DONE=true, DONE→CLOSED=true
- TaskStatus.canTransitionTo: TODO→DONE=false, TODO→CLOSED=false, DONE→TODO=false, CLOSED→anything=false
- TaskStatus.getAllowedTransitions: TODO→[IN_PROGRESS], IN_PROGRESS→[TODO,DONE], DONE→[CLOSED], CLOSED→[]
- TaskRepository: findByDeletedFalse excludes soft-deleted tasks
- TaskRepository: keyword search (case-insensitive title matching)
- TaskRepository: priority filter
- CreateTaskRequest validation: blank title → fails, title >200 chars → fails, description >5000 → fails
- CreateTaskRequest: priority defaults to MEDIUM when not specified (if using custom deserializer/default)

YOUR JOB: Design and write tests BEFORE any implementation code exists.

TEST DESIGN STRATEGY:
1. Red/Green Tests — one per AC
2. Boundary Tests — empty title, max length title (200), max description (5000)
3. Error Case Tests — invalid transitions, null inputs
4. Contract Tests — entity fields match contract types

TDD DISCIPLINE:
- For TaskStatus enum: pure unit tests (no Spring context)
- For Task entity + TaskRepository: @DataJpaTest with H2
- For DTO validation: use jakarta.validation.Validator directly
- JUnit 5 + Spring Boot Test
- Package: com.taskflow (match source structure)
- Tests go under: taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- Do NOT create implementation files or stubs
- Tests MUST fail when run (no implementation exists yet)

OUTPUT:
- Write test files
- Return: list of test file paths created

LOG WRITING:
Write to log path (append-only):
[LOG] task=T3 | event=test-design-start | strategy=red-green,boundary,error,contract
[LOG] task=T3 | event=test-design-complete | test-files={list} | test-count={number}

content.text: I'll start by reading the PLAN, CONTRACT, spec files, and pom.xml to understand the requirements and project structure.
Now let me read all the input files in parallel.

content.content:
1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow M1 (Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) — full-stack from entity to frontend
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + Java 17 + H2 in-memory + JPA + Spring Security + JJWT 0.12.5 | Vue 3.4 + Pinia 2.1 + axios + vue-router + Vite 5 + Vitest + TypeScript | stateless JWT auth | soft-delete pattern | state machine in enum
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, lowercase packages (com.taskflow.*) | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods, kebab-case file events | TS: PascalCase interfaces, camelCase fields
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] M4/M5 not implemented — M6 uses placeholder for assignee/tags | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | JWT secret in application.yml | all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**
     6→[SHARED] config/SecurityConfig.java | entity/Task.java | service/TaskService.java | controller/TaskController.java | exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Standards
     9→[SOURCE] none
    10→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code
    11→
    12→[SECTION] Specs
    13→[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    14→[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
    15→[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
    16→[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    17→
    18→[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
    19→[DEP] T1 → T2 → T4 → T5 (backend chain)
    20→[DEP] T3 → T4 (entity feeds into service)
    21→[DEP] T6 → T7 (frontend chain)
    22→[DEP] T1,T3,T6 are independent (wave 1, max 3 concurrent)
    23→
    24→[SECTION] Execution Strategy
    25→[STRATEGY] parallel-per-task | max-concurrent=3
    26→[WAVE] 1: T1(M1-Foundation), T3(M2+M3-Entity), T6(M6-Frontend-Infra) — all independent
    27→[WAVE] 2: T2(M1-Auth-API) after T1, T7(M6-Frontend-UI) after T6
    28→[WAVE] 3: T4(M2-CRUD-API) after T1+T3
    29→[WAVE] 4: T5(M3-Status-API) after T4
    30→

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:Priority,status:TaskStatus,createdBy:long,createdAt:LocalDateTime,updatedAt:LocalDateTime?
    17→[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
    18→[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    19→[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
    20→[TYPE] name=TaskStatus | fields=enum:TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED
    21→
    22→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    23→[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
    24→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
    25→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
    26→[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
    27→[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Error Format
    30→[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]
    31→
    32→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    33→

1→# M2: Task CRUD
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組提供任務（Task）的完整 CRUD 操作，包含建立、讀取、更新與刪除功能，以及支援分頁查詢、關鍵字搜尋與篩選條件的任務列表端點。所有端點皆需要通過 JWT 身份驗證。
     6→
     7→每個任務包含標題、描述、優先級等欄位。建立任務時自動記錄建立者（createdBy）與建立時間（createdAt），更新時自動記錄更新時間（updatedAt）。刪除採用軟刪除策略，設置 deleted 標記而非實際從資料庫移除記錄。
     8→
     9→任務列表支援分頁、排序、依標題關鍵字搜尋，以及依優先級篩選，確保大量資料時的查詢效能與使用者體驗。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 POST /api/tasks 帶入 title、description、priority，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含完整任務物件（含自動產生的 id、createdBy、createdAt）
    14→- AC2: 建立任務時未帶 priority，任務的 priority 預設為 MEDIUM
    15→- AC3: 建立任務時未帶 title 或 title 為空字串，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    16→- AC4: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含完整任務物件
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入不存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    18→- AC6: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 PUT /api/tasks/{id} 帶入更新欄位，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應反映更新後的內容，updatedAt 欄位有值
    19→- AC7: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 DELETE /api/tasks/{id}，回傳 HTTP 204 No Content，該任務被軟刪除
    20→- AC8: 軟刪除的任務不出現在 GET /api/tasks 的列表查詢結果中
    21→- AC9: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 存取已軟刪除的任務，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    22→- AC10: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks 不帶任何參數，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應為分頁格式，預設 page=0、size=20、按 createdAt 降序排列
    23→- AC11: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?keyword=xxx，僅回傳 title 包含該關鍵字的任務（不區分大小寫）
    24→- AC12: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?priority=HIGH，僅回傳 priority 為 HIGH 的任務
    25→- AC13: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?page=1&size=5，回傳正確的第二頁資料（跳過前 5 筆）
    26→- AC14: 不攜帶 Token 呼叫任何任務端點，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    27→- AC15: title 超過 200 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    28→- AC16: description 超過 5000 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    29→
    30→## API 端點
    31→
    32→### POST /api/tasks
    33→- 說明: 建立新任務
    34→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    35→- Request Body:
    36→  ```json
    37→  {
    38→    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    39→    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    40→    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW, default: MEDIUM)"
    41→  }
    42→  ```
    43→- Success Response: 201 Created
    44→  ```json
    45→  {
    46→    "id": "long",
    47→    "title": "string",
    48→    "description": "string",
    49→    "priority": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
    50→    "status": "TODO",
    51→    "createdBy": "long (user id)",
    52→    "createdAt": "ISO 8601 datetime",
    53→    "updatedAt": "ISO 8601 datetime or null"
    54→  }
    55→  ```
    56→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized)
    57→
    58→### GET /api/tasks/{id}
    59→- 說明: 取得單一任務詳情
    60→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    61→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    62→- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同上）
    63→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found or soft-deleted)
    64→
    65→### PUT /api/tasks/{id}
    66→- 說明: 更新任務內容
    67→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    68→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    69→- Request Body:
    70→  ```json
    71→  {
    72→    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    73→    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    74→    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)"
    75→  }
    76→  ```
    77→- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同建立，updatedAt 更新）
    78→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    79→
    80→### DELETE /api/tasks/{id}
    81→- 說明: 軟刪除任務
    82→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    83→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    84→- Success Response: 204 No Content
    85→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    86→
    87→### GET /api/tasks
    88→- 說明: 分頁查詢任務列表（支援搜尋與篩選）
    89→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    90→- Query Parameters:
    91→  - `page` (int, optional, default: 0) — 頁碼，從 0 開始
    92→  - `size` (int, optional, default: 20) — 每頁筆數
    93→  - `sort` (string, optional, default: "createdAt,desc") — 排序欄位與方向
    94→  - `keyword` (string, optional) — 依標題搜尋的關鍵字（不區分大小寫，模糊比對）
    95→  - `priority` (string, optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW) — 依優先級篩選
    96→- Success Response: 200 OK
    97→  ```json
    98→  {
    99→    "content": [{ "id": 1, "title": "...", "..." : "..." }],
   100→    "page": 0,
   101→    "size": 20,
   102→    "totalElements": 100,
   103→    "totalPages": 5
   104→  }
   105→  ```
   106→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized)
   107→
   108→## 業務規則
   109→
   110→- BR1: title 為必填欄位，長度限制 1-200 字元
   111→- BR2: description 為選填欄位，最大長度 5000 字元
   112→- BR3: priority 為列舉值，僅接受 HIGH、MEDIUM、LOW 三種值，未指定時預設為 MEDIUM
   113→- BR4: 建立任務時自動從 JWT Token 中擷取 createdBy（使用者 ID），不接受前端傳入
   114→- BR5: 建立任務時自動記錄 createdAt 為伺服器當前時間
   115→- BR6: 更新任務時自動記錄 updatedAt 為伺服器當前時間
   116→- BR7: 刪除為軟刪除（設置 deleted=true 或 deletedAt 時間戳），不實際移除資料庫記錄
   117→- BR8: 所有列表查詢自動排除已軟刪除的任務
   118→- BR9: 分頁預設值：page=0、size=20、sort=createdAt,desc
   119→- BR10: 新建任務的初始狀態為 TODO（由 M3 模組定義）
   120→
   121→## 相依模組
   122→
   123→- 依賴: M1 (Authentication) — 所有端點需要 JWT 身份驗證
   124→- 被依賴: M3 (Task State Machine)、M4 (Tag System)、M6 (Task Filter)、M7 (Dashboard)
   125→

1→# M3: Task State Machine
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組實現任務的狀態機管理，定義任務生命週期中的合法狀態與狀態轉換規則。任務具有四種狀態：TODO、IN_PROGRESS、DONE、CLOSED，每種狀態之間僅允許特定的轉換路徑。
     6→
     7→狀態轉換透過專用的 PATCH 端點執行，系統在轉換前驗證當前狀態是否允許轉換至目標狀態。此外提供查詢端點，讓前端可取得指定任務當前可用的合法轉換列表，用於 UI 按鈕的啟用/停用控制。
     8→
     9→CLOSED 為終止狀態，一旦進入 CLOSED 後不可再轉換至其他任何狀態。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 新建任務的初始狀態為 TODO
    14→- AC2: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 TODO 任務轉換為 IN_PROGRESS，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 IN_PROGRESS
    15→- AC3: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 IN_PROGRESS 任務轉換為 TODO，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 TODO
    16→- AC4: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 IN_PROGRESS 任務轉換為 DONE，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 DONE
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 DONE 任務轉換為 CLOSED，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 CLOSED
    18→- AC6: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 TODO 直接轉換為 DONE，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request 且包含錯誤訊息說明不允許該轉換
    19→- AC7: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 CLOSED 任務轉換為任何其他狀態，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    20→- AC8: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 TODO 直接轉換為 CLOSED，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    21→- AC9: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 DONE 轉換為 TODO，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    22→- AC10: 狀態轉換成功後，任務的 updatedAt 欄位更新為伺服器當前時間
    23→- AC11: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 TODO 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 ["IN_PROGRESS"]
    24→- AC12: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 IN_PROGRESS 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 ["TODO", "DONE"]
    25→- AC13: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 DONE 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 ["CLOSED"]
    26→- AC14: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 CLOSED 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含空陣列 []
    27→- AC15: 不攜帶 Token 呼叫狀態轉換或查詢端點，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    28→- AC16: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 帶入不存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    29→
    30→## API 端點
    31→
    32→### PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status
    33→- 說明: 執行任務狀態轉換
    34→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    35→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    36→- Request Body:
    37→  ```json
    38→  {
    39→    "status": "string (enum: TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)"
    40→  }
    41→  ```
    42→- Success Response: 200 OK
    43→  ```json
    44→  {
    45→    "id": "long",
    46→    "title": "string",
    47→    "description": "string",
    48→    "priority": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
    49→    "status": "TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED",
    50→    "createdBy": "long",
    51→    "createdAt": "ISO 8601 datetime",
    52→    "updatedAt": "ISO 8601 datetime"
    53→  }
    54→  ```
    55→- Error Responses: 400 (invalid transition), 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    56→
    57→### GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions
    58→- 說明: 查詢任務當前可用的狀態轉換列表
    59→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    60→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    61→- Success Response: 200 OK
    62→  ```json
    63→  {
    64→    "currentStatus": "TODO",
    65→    "availableTransitions": ["IN_PROGRESS"]
    66→  }
    67→  ```
    68→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    69→
    70→## 業務規則
    71→
    72→- BR1: 任務狀態列舉值共四種：TODO、IN_PROGRESS、DONE、CLOSED
    73→- BR2: 新建任務初始狀態固定為 TODO，不可由使用者指定
    74→- BR3: 合法的狀態轉換路徑如下：
    75→  - TODO → IN_PROGRESS
    76→  - IN_PROGRESS → TODO
    77→  - IN_PROGRESS → DONE
    78→  - DONE → CLOSED
    79→- BR4: 除上述四條路徑外，其餘所有狀態轉換皆為非法，應回傳 400 錯誤
    80→- BR5: CLOSED 為終止狀態（terminal state），進入後不可轉換至任何其他狀態
    81→- BR6: 每次成功的狀態轉換必須更新 updatedAt 欄位為伺服器當前時間
    82→- BR7: 狀態轉換不影響任務的其他欄位（title、description、priority 等）
    83→
    84→## 相依模組
    85→
    86→- 依賴: M1 (Authentication)、M2 (Task CRUD) — 基於既有任務資料進行狀態管理
    87→- 被依賴: M7 (Dashboard) — 儀表板需依狀態統計任務數量
    88→

content.text:
Now I have all the context I need. Let me design and write the test files. I need to create:

1. **TaskStatusTest.java** - Pure unit tests for TaskStatus enum (transitions, allowed transitions)
2. **TaskEntityTest.java** - @DataJpaTest for Task entity defaults and JPA persistence
3. **TaskRepositoryTest.java** - @DataJpaTest for TaskRepository queries (soft-delete exclusion, keyword search, priority filter)
4. **CreateTaskRequestValidationTest.java** - Jakarta Validation tests for CreateTaskRequest DTO
5. **TaskResponseTest.java** - Contract test for TaskResponse fields

Let me create the log directory first, then write all test files.
Now let me create all test files. I'll create them in parallel since they are independent.
All test files are written. Now let me write the log file.

content.text:
Compilation fails as expected -- all test files reference classes that do not exist yet (Task, TaskStatus, TaskRepository, CreateTaskRequest, TaskResponse). This confirms the tests are in the proper "red" TDD state.

Here is the summary of what was created:

---

**Test files created (5 files, 54 tests total):**

1. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatusTest.java`** (18 tests)
   - Pure unit tests, no Spring context
   - Covers: enum has exactly 4 values (TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, CLOSED)
   - Covers: `getAllowedTransitions()` for all 4 states
   - Covers: `canTransitionTo()` for all 4 valid transitions
   - Covers: `canTransitionTo()` for all invalid transitions (TODO->DONE, TODO->CLOSED, DONE->TODO, CLOSED->anything, etc.)
   - Edge case: null target handling

2. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskEntityTest.java`** (9 tests)
   - `@DataJpaTest` with H2
   - Covers: default status=TODO, deleted=false
   - Covers: JPA persist/retrieve round-trip with all fields
   - Covers: auto-generated id, createdAt populated on persist, updatedAt populated on update
   - Covers: Priority inner enum has exactly HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW
   - Covers: soft-delete flag toggle, status change persistence
   - Contract test: all getter return types match spec

3. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepositoryTest.java`** (12 tests)
   - `@DataJpaTest` with H2
   - Covers: `findByDeletedFalse` excludes soft-deleted tasks
   - Covers: keyword search (case-insensitive title matching), excludes soft-deleted
   - Covers: priority filter (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), excludes soft-deleted
   - Covers: pagination (page size, second page, partial last page)
   - Covers: combined keyword + priority filter

4. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/dto/CreateTaskRequestValidationTest.java`** (12 tests)
   - Uses Jakarta `Validator` directly, no Spring context
   - Title: null fails, empty fails, blank fails, 1 char passes, 200 chars passes, 201 chars fails
   - Description: null passes (optional), empty passes, 5000 passes, 5001 fails
   - Priority: explicit values pass, null passes, default is MEDIUM
   - Contract: field getter return types verified

5. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponseTest.java`** (3 tests)
   - Pure unit tests, no Spring context
   - Contract: all 8 fields exist with correct return types
   - Getter/setter round-trip
   - updatedAt can be null

**Log written to:** `C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-3.log.md`

**TDD status:** RED -- all tests fail to compile because implementation classes (Task, TaskStatus, TaskRepository, CreateTaskRequest, TaskResponse) do not exist yet.
